title: dichrostachys cinerea subsp. platycarpa
intro: Dichrostachys cinerea subsp. platycarpa, also known as the 'Platycarpa Thorn Tree', is a plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Dichrostachys cinerea subsp. platycarpa include tea infusions, extracts, and infusions in the form of capsules or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
